### New Auto-Fixes

- Added auto-fix for Yotpo, Google Review, and star rating accessibility patterns.
- Added auto-fix for missing footer landmark issues.
- Added auto-fixes for HTML tabable elements and manual cursor focus issues.
- Added auto-fix for missing labels and region issues in Google Translate widgets.

- Added auto-fix for SVGs missing accessible names.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed a crash caused by an invalid selector query in site-menu and carousel components.
- Fixed an issue with the button role missing auto-fix not applying correctly.
- Fixed the loading logic for the Rich Text Editor.
- Fixed JavaScript freezing on pages using region-qualified language codes (e.g., `en-US`).

### Improvements

- Migrated the build system to Rolldown for improved performance.
- Added auto-fix allow list support to production configuration types.
- Enabled auto-fix capabilities in the Sg scanner.

- Removed the rule test report from the internal report server.

### New Features

- You can now suspend the change watcher directly from the management console.
- FixRadio and FixRadioGroup components now support custom attribute placement for greater flexibility.

### Improvements

- CSS tracking now captures a broader set of results for more comprehensive monitoring.
- Fix reports now include an `isAutoFix` indicator so you can distinguish between automatic and manual fixes.
- Improved CSS detection by leveraging the browser's built-in API for more reliable results.
- Increased processing parallelism for faster scan and fix performance.

### Bug Fixes

- Fix states are now correctly preserved in the fix tracker once set, preventing unintended resets.
- HTML attributes now consistently use single quotes, resolving potential rendering inconsistencies.
- Resolved an issue that could prevent successful publishing of fixes.

### Maintenance

- Updated the build validation step to improve release reliability.
